steps.t: Ioron is south of Ingalad, in Linhir. The folk of Linhir are concerned for the safety of Ioron, who has been acting peculiarly for several hours.
Ioron is south of Ingalad, in Linhir. You have spoken with Ioron and he insists that the winds of hope are on the rise. Has he truly gone mad, as the …
The man Ioron believed to be Thorongil may be approaching the gates of Pelargir, in Lebennin. Ioron asked you to find Thorongil, great hero of Gondor.
The man Ioron believed to be Thorongil is in fact Aragorn, son of Arathorn. Ioron asked you to find Thorongil, great hero of Gondor, and you have foun…
